home.title: Kwa Miganda
home.subtitle: Aho Umurage w'Uburundi Uhurira n'Ubwiza bw'Isi
home.description: Ikigega c'umuco n'ibidukikije mu misozi ya Mwaro aho abashitsi basanga imigenzo ya kera, ubwiza bw'isi, n'ubushake nyakuri.
home.storyTitle: Aho ubwenge bw'Uburundi bwa kera buhurira n'ubwiza bw'isi.
home.storyDescription1: Abashitsi barakirwa mu Rugo rya kera — inzu y'abasogokuruza — aho basanga imihango, umuziki, ubukorikori, n'ibimera vy'ubuvuzi vyatanzwe mu bwonko.
home.storyDescription2: Kwa Miganda ni umushinga w'uburorerwe bw'umuco n'ikigega c'amahoro, kiri mu misozi y'icyatsi ya Mwaro.

heritageVisit.title: Gusura Umurage
heritageVisit.description: Vumbura Rugo rya kera maze uvumbure ubwubatsi bw'Uburundi bwa kera n'ubuzima bwa buri munsi.

culturalExperience.title: Ubunararibonye bw'Umuco
culturalExperience.description: Winjire mu muziki wa kera, ingoma, imivugo, n'imihango y'inkuru.

natureWalks.title: Kugenda mu Bwiza bw'Isi
natureWalks.description: Genda mu misozi y'icyatsi ya Mwaro, uyobowe n'inzobere z'aha hantu.

botanicalGarden.title: Ubusitani bw'Ibimera
botanicalGarden.description: Vumbura ibimera vy'ubuvuzi vya kera maze wige ku migenzo yo kuvura ya kera.

landscapes.label: UBWIZA BW'ISI & IMISOZI
landscapes.title: Vumbura Imisozi ya Mwaro
landscapes.description: Vumbura ubwiza bw'isi bushimishije bukikije Kwa Miganda — kuva ku misozi y'icyatsi kugera mu mashyamba y'icyatsi.

hills.title: Imisozi y'Icyatsi
hills.description: Imisozi y'icyatsi idahera ikurikirana ku kirere, itanga amashusho meza y'imisozi y'Uburundi.

forests.title: Amashyamba y'Icyatsi
forests.description: Amashyamba y'ubushyuhe yuzuye ibimera n'inyamaswa za kera, meza kugenda mu bwiza bw'isi no kuraba inyoni.

trails.title: Inzira z'Imisozi
trails.description: Inzira zo kugenda mu misozi nziza zinyeganyeza mu misozi, zigaragaza amazi amanuka n'amashusho meza.

plantations.title: Imirima y'Icayi
plantations.description: Imirima y'icayi ishimishije imanuka ku misozi, yerekana umurage w'uburimyi bw'Uburundi.

village.title: Umudugudu wa Kera
village.description: Imidugudu y'Uburundi y'ukuri aho imigenzo ya kera n'ubuzima bw'abaturage bikura mu mahoro n'ubwiza bw'isi.

sunset.title: Amashusho y'Izuba Rirengeye
sunset.description: Amashusho meza y'izuba rirengeye rirangiza ikirere mu rangi y'izahabu hejuru y'imisozi ya Mwaro.

cta.label: TEGURA URUGENDO RWAWE
cta.title: Tegura Gusura Kwa Miganda
cta.description: Tangura urugendo rwawe mu murage n'ubwiza bw'isi bw'Uburundi.

heritage.label: UMURAGE W'UMUCO
heritage.title: Ubuhamya bw'Imigenzo y'Uburundi
heritage.description: Kwa Miganda ntabwo ari aho gusa — ni uburorerwe bw'indangagaciro, aho buri nzu, ikimera, n'indirimbo bivuga inkuru y'ubutwari n'ubwiza.

architecture.title: Ubwubatsi bwa Kera
architecture.description: Rugo riroreka uburyo bwo kubaka bwa kera bukoresheje ubutaka, ibiti, n'ibyatsi — inzu ndangamurage y'ubuzima bw'Uburundi.

plants.title: Ibimera vy'Ubuvuzi
plants.description: Ubusitani bwacu bufise ibimera vyinshi vya kera vyakoreshejwe mu kuvura kwa kera, vyanditswe kandi vyitabwaho n'abasaza b'aha hantu.

music.title: Umuziki & Imivugo
music.description: Umve imbaraga z'ingoma z'Uburundi n'imigenzo y'imivugo itanga inkuru mu bwonko.

community.title: Abaturage
community.description: Kwa Miganda ifasha imiryango y'aha hantu, ikaba yemeza ko ubumenyi bw'umuco burorerwa kandi bugabanwa n'isi yose.

experience.title: Ubunararibonye Bwacu
experience.subtitle: Vumbura Umurage Uzima wa Burundi
experience.description: Winjire mu bunararibonye bw'ukuri buguhuza n'ubwiza bw'isi, umuco, n'ubushobozi bw'ubukirisitu bwa Burundi.

hero.title: Ubunararibonye bw'Ukuri
hero.description: Uva ku winjira mu muco gushika ku vumbura ubwiza bw'isi, vumbura ico gituma Kwa Miganda ihambaye.

cultural.title: Ubunararibonye bw'Umuco
cultural.description: Winjira mu mvo n'umwidondoro wa Burundi

wellness.title: Amahora & Kuruhuka
wellness.description: Subira imbaraga mu mubiri no mu mutwe mu mahoro n'ubwiza bw'isi

learning.title: Kwiga & Kuvumbura
learning.description: Ongereza ubumenyi bwawe kubwa ubunararibonye bukora

traditionalMusic.title: Umuziki n'Imyidagaduro ya Kera
traditionalMusic.description: Vumbura umurika wa Burundi kubwa imbyino, indirimbo n'immyidagaduro ya kera zivuga inkuru z'abakurambere bacu.

rugoVisit.title: Kugendera Rugo ya Kera
rugoVisit.description: Injira mu mutima w'ubuzima bwa Burundi bw'icyaro uko uvumbura urugo rwa kera, wigira ibikorwa vya kera n'imigenzo y'umusi ku musi.

natureWalks.title: Kugenda mu Bwiza bw'Isi
natureWalks.description: Vumbura ibimera n'inyamaswa vyinshi vya misozi ya Mwaro hamwe n'abayobozi b'inzobere bo hantu batanga ubumenyi bw'ubwiza bw'isi bwa kera.

botanicalGarden.title: Urwuri rw'Ibimera vy'Ubuvuzi
botanicalGarden.description: Iga ubuvuzi bwa Burundi bwa kera uko uvumbura urwuri rwacu rw'ibimera vy'ubuvuzi vy'ahantu.

cookingWorkshop.title: Inama yo Guteka Ibiryo vya Kera
cookingWorkshop.description: Jana abapfumu bacu mu guteka ibiryo vy'ukuri vya Burundi bikoresha ibikoresho vy'ahantu n'imigenzo ya kera.

storytelling.title: Inama y'Inkuru za Kera
storytelling.description: Teranira ku muriro abakurambere bakabandanya inkuru za kera, imigani n'ubwenge bwatanzwe kuva mu bihe bishize.

birdwatching.title: Urugendo rwo Kubona Inyoni
birdwatching.description: Raba ibisiga birenga 200 mu bwiza bw'isi bwazo, harimwo ibisiga bigaragara gusa mu misozi ya Burundi.

meditation.title: Gusenga & Gufata Igitondo
meditation.description: Rondera amahoro yo mu mutwe kubwa gusenga kw'ubuyobozi mu mahanga meza araba misozi.

craftWorkshop.title: Inama y'Ubuhinzi bwa Kera
craftWorkshop.description: Iga ubuhinzi bwa kera nk'ugupfuka agasandugu, ububumbyi canke ugukora ivyuma vya kera kubwa abahinzi b'inzobere bo hantu.

sunriseYoga.title: Inama ya Yoga ku Izuba Rirashe
sunriseYoga.description: Tangura umusi wawe na yoga no gusenga izuba rirashe hejuru y'imisozi myiza ya Burundi.

villageTour.title: Urugendo mu Mudugudu wa Hafi
villageTour.description: Rengera imigwi iri hafi kugira ngo umenye ubuzima bwa Burundi bw'icyaro, uhure n'imiryango yo hantu, ufase imishinga y'imigwi.

photography.title: Inama y'Ifoto
photography.description: Fata ubwiza bwa Burundi kubwa inama z'ifoto z'ubuyobozi zibanda ku bwiza bw'isi, umuco n'inyamaswa.

booking.title: Fata Ubunararibonye Bwawe
booking.description: Witeguye gutangura urugendo rwawe rwa Burundi? Hitamwo mu bunararibonye bwacu bwasuwe.
booking.note: Ubunarararibonye bwose burashobora guhindurwa. Twandikire ku migwi yihariye canke ibisabwa bidasanzwe.

expertGuides.title: Abayobozi b'Inzobere bo Hantu
expertGuides.description: Iga kubwa abayobozi b'inzobere bakunda gutanga umuco wabo n'umwidondoro wabo.

smallGroups.title: Imigwi Mito
smallGroups.description: Ubunararibonye bw'ibanga burahinga ubwitonzi bw'umwihariko n'amakomezi afise akamaro.

sustainable.title: Urugendo Ruhoraho
sustainable.description: Ibikorwa vyose bifasha imigwi yo hantu n'urwubatsi rw'ibidukikije.

flexible.title: Igihe Gishobora Guhindurwa
flexible.description: Ubunararibonye burashobora gutunganywa ku gihe cawe n'ibyo ukunda.

lodge.title: Lodge Yacu
lodge.subtitle: Ubwiyunge bw'Ukuri mu Mutima w'Ubwiza bw'Isi
lodge.description: Vumbura lodge yacu yoroshye kandi y'ukuri, iri mu mutima w'ubwiza bw'isi. Guhataniza bwiza ibikorwa vy'ubu n'ubwiyunge bw'umuco wa Burundi.
lodge.heroDescription: Jya mu bukirisitu bw'ukuri mu lodge yacu y'ibidukikije yakozwe ku mahora meza n'kwinjira mu muco.
lodge.amenitiesSubtitle: Ikivyo cyose ukeneye ku mahoro meza

rooms.title: Ibyumba Byacu
rooms.description: Buri kimwe mu byumba vyacu vya neza birahanga amashusho meza ya misozi y'ubwiza bwa Burundi n'ikizira kya Burundi kya kera.

standardRoom.title: Icyumba Kinini
standardRoom.description: Icyumba kinini bifise salle d'eau yihariye, amazi moto n'ikizira kya kera

deluxeRoom.title: Icyumba Cyiza
deluxeRoom.description: Icyumba kinini bifise ubwoko bwa mpande hamwe n'idirishya za mbere kandi n'ishusho rihoraho

suiteRoom.title: Intara
suiteRoom.description: Intara yasezerano ifise icyumba cya mbere, ibikoresho vyiza n'amashusho meza

dining.title: Ubwiyunge bw'Ibikoresho byo Kurya
dining.description: Resitora yacu itanga kumera kwa Burundi kwa kera kandi ky'iby'amahanga vyakorehanwa na mbere z'aha hantu.

breakfast.title: Ku Gitondo
breakfast.description: Ibikoresho by'umusi n'iby'isilikiti bifise igice cy'aha hantu

lunch.title: Mu Gitondo
lunch.description: Murabure w'ibintu bifise kumera kwa Burundi n'iby'amahanga

dinner.title: Mu Mahoro
dinner.description: Maboro meza y'ubwiza bw'umuco n'ibikoresho bya hamwe

vegetarian.title: Ibikoresho vy'Ibimera
vegetarian.description: Uburinzi bw'ibimera n'ibikoresho vy'iby'omugayo bivuguruza ku basaba

wellness.title: Ubuzima & Kuruhuka
wellness.description: Subira imbaraga mu mubiri n'umutwe hamwe n'ubwiza bwacu bw'ubuzima.

spa.title: Spa ya Kera
spa.description: Ibikorwa bifise ubwiza bw'ubuzima bwa kera bwa Burundi

massage.title: Gusuuza
massage.description: Ibikorwa by'inzobere vyakoza ku buruhuko n'ibintu bikomeye

yoga.title: Inzira z'Yoga
yoga.description: Inzira z'umusi n'z'izuba rirashe mu mahanga meza

meditation.title: Inama z'Gusenga
meditation.description: Gusenga kw'ubuyobozi kugira ngo rondera amahoro n'ubwenge

activities.title: Ibikorwa Aha Hantu
activities.description: Gakora hamwe n'ubwiza bw'isi n'umuco kubwa ibikorwa byacu vidahaze.

hiking.title: Kugenda mu Bwiza bw'Isi
hiking.description: Vumbura ubwiza bw'isi bukinzira lodge yacu

bird.title: Gutemera Inyoni
bird.description: Raba inyoni zirenga 200 mu bwiza bw'isi bwazo

cultural.title: Inama z'Umuco
cultural.description: Inama z'ubwiyunge hamwe n'abayobozi bo hantu n'abahinzi

bonfire.title: Umuriro w'Mahoro
bonfire.description: Kubutanya ku muriro kugira ngo uhure n'inkuru, umuziki, n'incuti z'iyezi

authentication.title: Ubunararibonye bw'Ukuri
authentication.description: Byakozwe habwa imigenzo ya kera n'ubwiyunge bw'ubu

connectivity.title: Guhuza
connectivity.description: WiFi ivugwa mu mahanga makora kubona ubuhuza

safety.title: Mahanga Mariho
safety.description: Umutekano wa 24/7 n'inzira z'ubuvuzi aha hantu

parking.title: Parking yihariye
parking.description: Ivugi ry'ibinyabizamakwibwa ryihariye kuri aho hantu

booking.title: Fata Icyumba Cyawe
booking.description: Witeguye kubunararibonye budatanzagura ? Fata icyumba nonaha.
booking.note: Imiterere y'inzira igupeshwe. Twandikire kugira ngo hafate inzira z'imigwi n'ifasha z'ibuze.

history.title: Amateka
history.description: Vumbura amateka y'ubutunzi kandi ashimishije y'ako karere kacu.

culture.title: Umuco
culture.description: Winjire mu migenzo n'umuco w'aha hantu vyarorokanijwe mu bwonko.

conservation.title: Uburorerwe
conservation.description: Ubwitange bwacu mu kurorera ibidukikije n'umurage w'umuco.

location.title: Aho Duri
location.addressValue: Kwa Miganda Lodge, Intara ya Mwaro
location.byCar: Mu modoka: amasaha 2 uhereye mu mujyi munini
location.airportTransfer: Ubwikorezi bwo ku kibuga c'indege burahari

booking.title: Tanga Umwanya Ubu
booking.successMessage: Murakoze ko mutanze umwanya! Tuzobamenyesha vuba.

footer.description: Ikigega c'umuco n'ibidukikije mu misozi ya Mwaro, Burundi. Aho imigenzo ya kera ihurira n'ubwiza bw'isi.
